thig5.12:1.1: Before, I had fallen on evil times:
thig5.12:1.4: no way to obtain clothing & food.
thig5.12:2.1: So, taking a staff & bowl in hand,
thig5.12:2.2: begging for alms from house to house,
thig5.12:2.4: I wandered for seven full years.
thig5.12:4.4: urged me on to the highest goal.
thig5.12:5.3: Her exhortation was not in vain.
thig5.12:5.4: Endowed with the three knowledges, I’m effluent- free.
